title: Add golden-grid Topology view
description: Add a containment-first Topology base view with a golden-ratio grid, merged cells, stable area geometry, component-safe routing, and fixed transparent dashed subgraph styling.
decision_notes: The public UI name is Topology and the API base-view identifier is topology.
Subgraphs are fixed to no fill plus a dashed outline; zones remain lightly filled.
The canvas, cells, gaps, and padding use the golden ratio; components may merge integer grid cells horizontally or vertically.
Explicit placement hints anchor nodes only. Zone, boundary, and subgraph geometry is derived from member cells to preserve containment.
Add info overlays do not change Topology geometry.
verification: npm test = 244 passing before the two final QIF assertions; topology suite = 9 passing afterward
Browser: viewBox 1340x828 (ratio 1.61836), node overlaps 0, subgraph fill none and dashed stroke
